response:
angel has written letters to all of her pen pals and is putting all of the letters in envelopes most of the letters are put into large envelopes and the remaining 20 letters are put into small envelopes the large envelopes each contain 2 letters each angel has written a total of 80 letters how many large envelopes did she use

the large envelopes each contain 2 letters each so the number of large envelopes is 80 divided by 2 which equals 40 large envelopes the total number of letters is 80 and 20 letters are put into small envelopes so the number of small envelopes is 20 divided by 1 which equals 20 small envelopes is there anything else i can help with?
